zh-CN.name: 干锅花菜
zh-CN.intro: 干锅花菜是一道香香的菜，花菜脆脆的，带着一点点辣味。妈妈会把它放在小锅里，热乎乎的，配米饭吃特别棒。

story.title: 🥘小花菜的奇妙旅行
story.body: 今天，妈妈买回来一朵白白的花菜。小花菜问妈妈：“我们要去哪里呀？”妈妈笑着说：“去做干锅花菜，给你一个惊喜！”妈妈把花菜掰成小朵，洗得干干净净。锅里放油，加入蒜片和一点点辣椒，炒出香味。花菜跳进锅里，和它们一起跳舞。小火慢慢炒呀炒，花菜变得有一点点焦黄，香气飘满了厨房。最后，妈妈把花菜盛在一个小干锅里，下面还点着小火，发出滋滋的声音。宝宝尝了一口，花菜脆脆的，咸香可口，还有一丝丝辣味，宝宝说：“太好吃了！我喜欢干锅花菜！”从此，小花菜成了宝宝最喜欢的蔬菜之一。

knowledge.title: 干锅花菜是什么？
knowledge.body: 干锅花菜是把花菜切成小朵，先炒香蒜和辣椒，再放入花菜慢慢炒熟。炒的时候不加水，花菜会变得边缘焦脆，中间软嫩，味道很香。

en.name: Dry Pot Cauliflower
en.intro: Dry Pot Cauliflower is a fragrant dish. The cauliflower is crispy with a little spicy hint. Mommy serves it in a hot pot, and it goes perfectly with rice.

story.title: 🥘The Little Cauliflower's Wonderful Journey
story.body: Today, Mommy brought home a white cauliflower. The little cauliflower asked, 'Where are we going?' Mommy smiled and said, 'To make Dry Pot Cauliflower, a surprise for you!' Mommy broke the cauliflower into small florets and washed them clean. She heated oil in the pan, added garlic slices and just a tiny bit of chili, frying until fragrant. The cauliflower jumped into the pan and danced with them. Over low heat, they sizzled and stirred until the cauliflower got a little golden at the edges, filling the kitchen with a yummy smell. Finally, Mommy placed the cauliflower in a little dry pot with a small flame underneath, making a sizzling sound. Baby took a bite — the cauliflower was crispy, savory, and just a tiny bit spicy. Baby said, 'Yummy! I love Dry Pot Cauliflower!' From then on, little cauliflower became one of baby's favorite veggies.

knowledge.title: What is Dry Pot Cauliflower?
knowledge.body: Dry Pot Cauliflower is made by cutting cauliflower into florets. First, fry garlic and chili until fragrant, then add the cauliflower and cook without water. It gets crispy edges and a soft inside, with a delicious savory taste.
